    F

    filterCategories() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.ManageCategoriesScreenController
    Called when the user types in the filter field and clicks search.
    filterTransactions() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.ManageTransactionsScreenController
    Called when the user clicks the filter button.
    filterTransactions(TransactionFilterForm) - Static method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.service.TransactionService
    Returns transactions matching the given filter criteria.
    FinanceManagementSystemApplication - Class in hr.java.financemanagementsystem.app
    Main entry point for the Finance Management System application.
    FinanceManagementSystemApplication() - Constructor for class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.app.FinanceManagementSystemApplication
     
    FinanceManagementSystemLauncher - Class in hr.java.financemanagementsystem.app
     
    FinanceManagementSystemLauncher() - Constructor for class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.app.FinanceManagementSystemLauncher
     
    findAll() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.AbstractRepository
    Returns all entities of this type from the database.
    findAll() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.CategoryDatabaseRepository
    Returns all categories for the currently logged-in user.
    findAll() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.TransactionDatabaseRepository
    Returns all transactions for the currently logged-in user, ordered by most recent first.
    findAll() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.UserDatabaseRepository
    Returns all users from the database.
    findByFilters(TransactionFilterForm) - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.TransactionDatabaseRepository
    Returns transactions matching the given filter criteria.
    findById(Long) - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.AbstractRepository
    Finds a single entity by its id.
    findById(Long) - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.CategoryDatabaseRepository
    Finds a category by its id.
    findById(Long) - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.TransactionDatabaseRepository
    Finds a transaction by its id.
    findById(Long) - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.UserDatabaseRepository
    Finds a user by their id.
    findCategoryByName(String, User) - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.CategoryDatabaseRepository
    Finds a category by name for a specific user.
    findLatestTransactions() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.TransactionDatabaseRepository
    Returns the 5 most recent transactions for the logged-in user.
    findTotalIncome() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.TransactionDatabaseRepository
    Returns the total income for the logged-in user in the last 30 days.
    findTotalOutcome() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.TransactionDatabaseRepository
    Returns the total expenses for the logged-in user in the last 30 days.
    findUserByUsername(String) - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.UserDatabaseRepository
    Finds a user by their username.
